calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Apr-29-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOACIATION, INC.'S Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported. (610/EAH)

MOTION To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS GLOBE EATS, INC., JOSEPH MANZARE, MARY KLINGBEIL MOTION to Set Aside Default and Default Judgment. Appearances: Robert F. Cohen, Esq. Attorney at Law, (800) 492-257, specially appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Alex Volchegursky, Esq. of Georgopoulos & Economidis (415) 986-4000 appearing for Defendants and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Request to set aside default is denied; Request to set aside default judgment is granted. Plaintiff may file an accurate Amended Judgment. Order signed in open Court. (Counsel to submit Judgment.) (302/PHA)Judge: Paul H. Alvarado; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Notice And Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Craig A. Block As Receiver
Off Calendar Dec-29-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Alexander Volchegursky, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Globe Eats, Inc.

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s Motion for appointment of receiver, and to appoint Craig A. Block as receiver, denied without prejudice. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice And Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Craig A. Block As Receiver
Off Calendar Nov-24-2009 Continued To Dec-29-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Alexander Volchegursky, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Globe Eats, Inc.

No other appearance, Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s Motion For Appointment Of Received, And To Appoint Craig A. Block As Receiver is continued to December 29, 2009 at 9:00 a.m. Parties to meet and confer. If hearing necessary, defendant's opposition must be filed and served by December 18, 2009. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
